description_long: This is a modern, boxy sofa with a bold red upholstery and a geometric, modular design. The sofa features a wide, flat seat and backrest, both divided into two large, rectangular cushions that are visually uniform and appear firmly attached. The armrests are straight, flat, and extend the full depth of the sofa, matching the height of the backrest and contributing to the overall block-like silhouette. The legs are short and blocky, positioned at the corners, and are mostly concealed by the sofa's base, giving it a grounded, sturdy appearance. The upholstery is smooth and solid-colored, with subtle seam lines outlining the edges and panels, and no visible decorative patterns or tufting. The overall look is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for urban public spaces or modern residential settings.
description: A bold red, boxy sofa with smooth upholstery, straight armrests, and a modular, minimalist design. The seat and backrest are divided into two large, uniform cushions, giving it a modern and sturdy appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the sofa, with two large seat and back cushions, and straight armrests on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the flat armrest, and the blocky leg at the corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, uninterrupted back panel and the straight lines of the armrests.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the depth and the flat, rectangular armrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, rectangular seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all attached and uniform in size, forming a continuous seating and backrest surface.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, flat armrests at each end, matching the height of the backrest, with a boxy, rectangular profile and no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, blocky legs positioned at the corners, mostly hidden by the sofa's base, likely made of wood or metal, with a sturdy and unobtrusive appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight backrest divided into two large, rectangular segments, continuous across the width, with no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid red upholstery with a smooth texture and visible seam lines outlining the edges; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
